name: Grand Depart Team Presentation Area - Sagrada Familia
summary: Non-viewing-day context: TMB identifies July 2 team-presentation impacts in the Sagrada Familia area.
whyItMatters: The team presentation is not a viewing day, but it may affect arrival plans, sightseeing, and transit if the trip overlaps July 2.
pros: Official TMB notice confirms event-related disruptions in the Sagrada Familia area
Useful for avoiding accidental sightseeing plans in a locked-down/high-crowd zone
Connects to the official Grand Depart site schedule context
cons: This is explicitly not one of the selected viewing days
Exact public viewing setup, security perimeter, and event timing need the Ajuntament schedule/map
TMB page focuses on transport disruption rather than the cultural programme

logistics.opening_hours: July 2; exact public event hours need official Ajuntament schedule verification
logistics.transit: L2 Sagrada Familia station will not stop from 13:00 until the event ends; L5 Provenca-Marina concourse will close from 13:00 and access may be restricted.
logistics.parking: Unknown; avoid driving near Sagrada Familia on July 2
logistics.road_closure_notes: Treat Sagrada Familia and nearby streets as a high-disruption area on July 2.

timing.best_visit_window: Avoid normal sightseeing transfers through Sagrada Familia on Thu Jul 2 after midday unless attending the event

sources.title: TMB - Avis Tour 2026
sources.note: Official service notice confirming July 2 team-presentation disruptions in the Sagrada Familia area and L2/L5 access impacts.

sources.title: Ajuntament de Barcelona - Tour de France Barcelona 2026
sources.note: Official Grand Depart organizer site confirming Barcelona hosts the Grand Depart and listing key official event context.

open_questions: Find the official Ajuntament programme page for the exact team presentation public route and timing.
Confirm whether the trip arrives early enough for July 2 context to matter.
